text: As I sit in this clean, modern space, I am struck by the cool sterility of my surroundings. The glass, the lines, the muted colors accentuated by the occasional emergency red, all seem to nudge me toward a state of alertness and anticipation. I feel both contained and observed, like a participant in an experiment or a visitor in a world not wholly my own. There is a sense of transition, as if I am about to enter a new realm of thought or discovery, slightly disoriented, yet curious.
